angle_name: AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) - Brand Story
layout_name: Swiss Grid (Asymmetric left-aligned text layout, minimal background)

displayText.headline: Discover Luxury in the Heart of the Jungle
displayText.offer: Book Now for Exclusive Safari Experience
displayText.subheading: Witness the wild like never before with our premier accommodations and expert-guided jeep safaris.
displayText.date: Avail this offer for the upcoming holiday season.
displayText.footer: Limited time offer, terms and conditions apply.

data.description: The advertisement features a Swiss Grid layout with a bold, captivating image of the lush jungle aligning to the right. On the left, asymmetric text captivates and informs with a blend of elegant fonts. The primary colors of the brand create a serene and inviting atmosphere, drawing attention to urgent calls-to-action.
